prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1JZ-GTE VVTi (2.5L inline-6) with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger, custom 44mm HKS wastegate, and a Tomei 264° camshaft kit for optimized high-RPM power delivery, paired with a GReddy Trust intercooler and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Fujitsubo GSpec muffler for reduced backpressure

Full bolt-on reinforcement with a TRD 8-point roll cage (JZX100-specific), Cusco 2-way LSD (80% lock), and a KAAZ 1.5-way differential for improved torque distribution, alongside a set of HKS Hipermax IV GT coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs for aggressive cornering

Standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom wiring harness for full engine management, integrated with a Link G4+ Xtreme for boost control, and a set of ID1000 fuel injectors paired with a Walbro 450LPH fuel pump to support 550+ HP on E85 fuel
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (JZX100-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler for aggressive stance and downforce, finished in a custom matte Nitro Yellow with gloss black accents

Custom 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +30 rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels in a gold finish, wrapped in 245/40R18 and 275/35R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires for maximum grip and track-ready performance

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JZX100-specific mounts), Takata 4-point harnesses, a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay with a digital AIM MXS Strada dash display for real-time telemetry
